requirement_topic.en: IEC 61851 Safety and Coastal Island Derating

summary.en: Cape Verde EV charger projects should be documented against IEC 61851-1 for conductive EV supply equipment and IEC 61851-23 for DC EV supply equipment where applicable. As a salt-mist Atlantic archipelago with coastal exposure, wind, heat, limited island logistics, and outdoor installations, the product package should also address enclosure IP rating, corrosion protection, connector temperature rise, UV exposure, surge protection, maintainability, and derating under island conditions.
summary.zh: 佛得角电动汽车充电桩项目应依据IEC 61851-1准备传导式电动汽车供电设备文件；直流设备还应依据IEC 61851-23准备证据。作为受盐雾影响的北大西洋群岛市场，且存在沿海暴露、风、热、岛屿物流限制和户外安装条件，产品资料包还应覆盖外壳IP等级、防腐、接口温升、紫外暴露、浪涌保护、可维护性以及岛屿条件下的降额。
summary.zht: 維德角電動汽車充電樁項目應依據IEC 61851-1準備傳導式電動汽車供電設備文件；直流設備還應依據IEC 61851-23準備證據。作為受鹽霧影響的北大西洋群島市場，且存在沿海暴露、風、熱、島嶼物流限制和戶外安裝條件，產品資料包還應覆蓋外殼IP等級、防腐、接口溫升、紫外暴露、浪湧保護、可維護性以及島嶼條件下的降額。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-1 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — General requirements
IEC 61851-23 — DC electric vehicle supply equipment
IEC 60529 — IP Code for enclosure protection
IEC 60068-2-52 — Salt mist cyclic corrosion testing
IGQPI standards and adopted IEC/European requirements

summary.en: China's comparable safety baseline is GB/T 18487.1-2023, with China-specific connector, communication, and installation assumptions. GB/T 18487.1 evidence is a useful design reference but does not replace IEC 61851 test evidence, IEC-family enclosure and environmental testing, or project-specific corrosion and derating documentation for Cape Verde.
summary.zh: 中国可比安全基线为GB/T 18487.1-2023，但其包含中国特有的接口、通信和安装假设。GB/T 18487.1证据可作为设计参考，但不能替代IEC 61851测试证据、IEC体系外壳及环境测试，或面向佛得角项目的防腐和降额文件。
summary.zht: 中國可比安全基線為GB/T 18487.1-2023，但其包含中國特有的接口、通訊和安裝假設。GB/T 18487.1證據可作為設計參考，但不能替代IEC 61851測試證據、IEC體系外殼及環境測試，或面向維德角項目的防腐和降額文件。

gap.en: Exporters should prepare an IEC 61851 clause matrix, accredited safety test reports, DC IEC 61851-23 evidence, enclosure IP and corrosion documentation, surge-protection ratings, thermal derating curves, installation manuals, and maintenance instructions suitable for coastal island sites. A GB/T-only safety file leaves connector, environmental, and project-acceptance gaps.
gap.zh: 出口商应准备IEC 61851逐条矩阵、认可安全测试报告、直流IEC 61851-23证据、外壳IP及防腐文件、浪涌保护额定值、热降额曲线、安装手册，以及适用于沿海岛屿场地的维护说明。仅有GB/T安全文件会留下接口、环境和项目验收差距。
gap.zht: 出口商應準備IEC 61851逐條矩陣、認可安全測試報告、直流IEC 61851-23證據、外殼IP及防腐文件、浪湧保護額定值、熱降額曲線、安裝手冊，以及適用於沿海島嶼場地的維護說明。僅有GB/T安全文件會留下接口、環境和項目驗收差距。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where IEC 61851 or IEC-derived requirements are specified by IGQPI, ARME, ELECTRA, tender, site owner, or charge-point operator; environmental derating is project-critical for coastal island installations
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 applies to China domestic design and is not direct IEC 61851 evidence for Cape Verde projects

source.publisher: IGQPI — Instituto de Gestão da Qualidade e da Propriedade Intelectual

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Use GB/T 18487 evidence only as a starting point. Cape Verde-facing documentation should include IEC 61851 safety evidence plus salt-mist, enclosure, surge, thermal, and maintenance evidence for coastal island operation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] GB/T 18487证据只能作为起点。面向佛得角的文件应包括IEC 61851安全证据，以及针对沿海岛屿运行的盐雾、外壳、浪涌、热和维护证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] GB/T 18487證據只能作為起點。面向維德角的文件應包括IEC 61851安全證據，以及針對沿海島嶼運行的鹽霧、外殼、浪湧、熱和維護證據。
